disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known pre-existing lesion on the sole of the foot present for roughly three months before the injury
trigger_question_examples: How long has this been on your foot?
Was there anything there before you caught it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had a wart on the sole of my right foot for about three months. I'd just been leaving it alone until I knocked it today.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute mechanical shear trauma partially avulsed the surface of the lesion, with minor bleeding
trigger_question_examples: Did it bleed or break the skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I caught it hard on the edge of a stair and it tore the top off. It bled a little and it's been really sore since.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe localised pain causing complete inability to weight-bear, in a person who lives alone
trigger_question_examples: Can you put any weight on it?
Is there anyone at home who can help you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't stand on it at all — it's about a 9 out of 10 the second I try. And I live on my own, so I'm stuck.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No systemic symptoms — patient denies fever, chills or feeling unwell
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any fever or chills?
Do you feel unwell in yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't feel hot or shivery, and I don't feel sick — it's just the foot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No spreading redness, pus, or increasing swelling around the lesion that the patient can see
trigger_question_examples: Is the redness spreading out from it?
Is there any pus or yellow discharge?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a bit red right at the spot but I can't see it spreading, and there's no pus — just the dried blood where the top came off.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I haven't really looked closely, it just hurts — do you want me to check?
